headline: FITB Q1 Deep Dive: Comerica Acquisition Drives Growth, Integration Progresses
summary: Regional banking company Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 32.2% year on year to $2.86 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.83 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.
